Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are going to create an event log with one row per event per case order_id Steps 1 Identify the events we can extract from each table 2 For each event we need Case ID order_id Activity Name a descriptive name for the activity Timestamp the time when the event occurred Resource Actor if available Other attributes if relevant

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: From Orders table Event Order Created From Order Lines table Event Item Picked one event per line item From Delivery table We have two events per delivery Delivery Dispatched and Delivery Arrived From Invoice table Event Invoice Issued From Payments table Event Payment Received

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Resource sales_person_id if we consider the sales person as the actor Resource carrier_id the carrier who dispatched Resource billing_person_id For payment events we do not have a resource so we might omit the resource or leave it NULL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The Payments table does not have a direct link to the order but through the invoice So we must join with the Invoice table to get the order_id

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We can have additional columns Item ID Quantity Delivery ID Invoice ID Payment ID Amount Payment Method Payment Reference Delivery Note

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We will include Resource as the actor and additional columns for attributes that are specific to the event type to keep it simple

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are going to create a list of events for each order We will generate events from each table and then combine them Important We must ensure that the events are in chronological order per case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must be cautious about the order of events We are going to collect all events and then sort the entire event log by Case ID and then by Timestamp

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can precompute dictionaries for order lines deliveries invoices and payments by order_id and use a mapping from invoice_id to order_id for payments

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: For order_id 1001 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Delivery Dispatched Delivery Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received For order_id 1002 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Delivery Dispatched Delivery Dispatched Delivery Arrived Delivery Arrived Invoice Issued Invoice Issued Payment Received Payment Received

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Order 1004 has no delivery invoice or payment records so we include only the events we have

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now we must generate the table one row per event with columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource Item ID Quantity Delivery ID Invoice ID Payment ID Amount Payment Method Payment Reference Delivery Note

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We have included all events We have sorted by Case ID and Timestamp We have used the resource for events where available and left it empty for payment events
